task_objective: Fix non-installed games appearing in the dropdown box
design_decisions: Refined the game filtering in refresh_statuses to exclude games that Ludusavi scans but finds no files or registry entries for. This prevents empty placeholders (like uninstalled custom games) from appearing in the UI dropdown.
results: The dropdown now correctly omits games with no detected data. Verified with an updated unit test and full suite pass. All quality checks (ruff, ty) are green.
